rationale: The citing paper uses Van den Bulte et al. (2018) for specific mechanism-level claims, not just a generic literature list. It explicitly invokes that paper's better-matching and social-enrichment logic to frame alternative explanations and to position what its own analyses must control for or go beyond. The cited work also appears in the concluding positioning of contribution, where the authors state their contribution is beyond prior referred-customer value findings.
relation_description: The citing paper builds on Van den Bulte et al. (2018) as prior mechanism-based referral-program research and extends it by examining a new downstream outcome: referred customers' propensity to generate further referrals. It adds social appropriateness as an additional explanation while treating better matching and social enrichment from the cited paper as benchmark alternatives.
